gonzales-ernest.text: As of 2026-07-04, FEC filings show Ernest Anthony Tony Gonzales's campaign has raised $2,270,926 and spent $3,402,505.

No U.S. House roll-call voting record was in our data set for Ernest Anthony Tony Gonzales (non-incumbent candidates have no floor votes to record). Public candidate filings are listed at the source below.

limon-santos.text: As of 2026-07-04, FEC filings show Santos M. Limon's campaign has raised $356,755 and spent $6,815.
No U.S. House roll-call voting record was in our data set for Santos M. Limon (non-incumbent candidates have no floor votes to record). Public candidate filings are listed at the source below.

base.summary: TX-23: 2 candidate(s) on file for U.S. House of Representatives, TX-23. Bullets below summarize each candidate's FEC-reported campaign finance and, for sitting U.S. House members, selected 2025-2026 roll-call votes on file. This is comparative, sourced information only -- it does not recommend a choice.
caveats: Only facts present in our sourced candidate data set are shown; missing fields mean no public data was on file at build time.
Voting records only exist for sitting U.S. House incumbents; non-incumbent challengers have no federal roll-call history.
